name: ai-context configuration
purpose: Keep a fresh ai-context checkout usable before any personal projects, scenes, skills, or rules have been imported.

source.whenToRead: Read when installing, validating, or initializing ai-context.

whyThisComposition: Fresh install state contains only the ai-context project. Run ai-context-init to add local projects and relationships.

projects.name: ai-context
projects.reason: Core project required for installation and onboarding.

operationGuide.onboarding: Ask the AI tool to run the ai-context-init skill after install.
operationGuide.validation: Run node scripts/install-ai-context.mjs validate and npm test.
notes: No personal projects, rules, skills, or tasks are configured in the fresh state.

readPolicy.notes: Do not load optional source files until the user starts initialization.
